label: Hebrew Month Start Calculator
description: Calculates Hebrew month start dates using selected moon/sun/star rules and feeds results into calendar, feast, meal, and storehouse planning.

supportedRulePresets.label: Full Moon (Month 1 at/near Full Moon)
supportedRulePresets.description: Treats the full moon as the anchor for Hebrew month start, matching your Exodus/Passover full-moon departure logic.

supportedRulePresets.label: Astronomical New Moon
supportedRulePresets.description: Uses the astronomical conjunction (new moon) as the boundary for month transitions.

supportedRulePresets.label: First Visible Crescent
supportedRulePresets.description: Month starts at the first evening when the crescent moon is visible after conjunction.

supportedRulePresets.label: Moon Does Not Cross Meridian
supportedRulePresets.description: Uses the rule that the moon does not pass the meridian between sunsets as a month boundary signal.

timeDataProvider.label: timeanddate.com API or CSV imports
timeDataProvider.notes: Shim should request or parse moonrise, moonset, sunrise, sunset, and (optionally) star/constellation info from timeanddate.com-compatible data sources.
